mnemonics: G.R.E.E.N. I.T. - Generate less, Reuse heat, Employ virtualization, Extend device life, Normalize power management, Implement thin clients, Turn off unused systems
keyPoints: Virtualization reduces physical server count and energy consumption.
Power management features (like sleep mode) must be activated to be effective.
Proper e-waste recycling is crucial for preventing toxic materials from entering landfills.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on new energy-efficient hardware and ignoring the larger carbon footprint of manufacturing.
Assuming 'cloud' computing is inherently green, without considering the energy source of the data center.
Keeping old, extremely inefficient systems running instead of replacing them with modern, efficient ones due to a fear of e-waste.
